title: Bridge Essay: Physical activity, mindfulness meditation, or heart rate variability biofeedback

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** (Phase 2) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Breath/Soul to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Physical activity, mindfulness meditation, or heart rate variability biofeedback for stress reduction: arandomized controlled trial.** — Appl Psychophysiol Biofeedback. PMID: 26111942. DOI: 10.1007/s10484-015-9293-x. In contemporary western societies stress is highly prevalent, therefore the need for stress-reducing methods is great. This randomized controlled trial compared the efficacy of self-help physical activity (PA), mindfulness meditation (MM), and heart rate variability biofeedback (HRV-BF) in reducing stress and its related symptoms. We randomly allocated 126 participants to PA, MM, or HRV-BF upon enrollment, of whom 76 agreed to participate. The interventions consisted of psycho-education and an i
